choices.label: PK 32–42 µm; columellae meerrijig; lumina kleiner dan muribreedte.

outcome.text:
23.15 *Paeonia officinalis*

PK sferoïdisch tot prolaat (PForml 1,08–1,39). Polarvelden klein (PFeldI 0,15–0,22). Exine 1,5–2,0 µm. Brochi tot 1,5 µm; muri breed; overgangen microreticulum–tectum perforatum. Columellae meerrijig, in fasecontrast herkenbaar.

*Paeonia officinalis* L. (2)
32,5–42,0 µm, MiW 36,9 µm; 50 PK, Oa
